title: Prove and close current model/execution gating boundary if already clean enough
objective: Verify whether baseball judgment is already in mlb_model and execution-style gating is already in sports_bot_v2 model_bridge/bot path, and close the item honestly if no real code move is needed.
acceptance_criteria: current boundary documented in plain English
any remaining real violation explicitly named
final status is CLOSED_VERIFIED, PARTIAL, or BLOCKED
rollback: Proof-only unless a real remaining violation is proven.
